series_metadata.series_description: This series refers to consultative work products (letters, reports, attachments) provided to employers by Division of Safety & Hygiene field operations consultants (safety, industrial hygiene, ergonomics). These work products detail and summarize loss prevention services provided by these consultants. This series does not include support documentation and data files which are covered instead under BWC’s Major Research retention schedule series 855-1172.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years then destroy. ; Microform: Retain for 5 years then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Burn
